changeSet.author: cuongdo
changeSet.comment: Xoá FK và cột book_id khỏi loan_items do chuyển quan hệ sang N-N
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE loan_items DROP FOREIGN KEY fk_loan_items_book;
ALTER TABLE loan_items DROP COLUMN book_id;

changeSet.author: cuongdo
changeSet.comment: Tạo bảng join loan_item_books cho quan hệ N-N giữa loan_items và books
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS loan_item_books ( loan_item_id bigint not null, book_id bigint not null, primary key (loan_item_id, book_id), foreign key (loan_item_id) references loan_items(id), foreign key (book_id) references books(id) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4;
